name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened cream cheese and sour cream in a bowl.
2. Stir in the lemon juice until well blended.
3. Add the caviar, chopped fresh dill or crushed dried dill, and diced purple onion.
4. Mix gently to incorporate all ingredients.
5. Serve immediately.
